description: Preprocess a CSV (median-impute + standard-scale numeric, most-frequent-impute + one-hot categorical), compare Logistic Regression / Random Forest / Gradient Boosting by 5-fold cross-validation, tune the winner with GridSearchCV, then report test accuracy / precision / recall / F1 (and ROC AUC when binary).
rules: read-only with respect to inputs; writes only under record_store
the last CSV column is the target unless TARGET_COL names another
stratified 80/20 split with random_state=42 for reproducibility
graceful: if scikit-learn is absent the porter still writes a valid non-empty JSON note
usage: Set DATA_CSV (a labeled table; last column = target unless TARGET_COL is set). Optional: TARGET_COL, TEST_SIZE (default 0.2). Output: classification.json.
limitation: Requires scikit-learn + pandas + numpy at runtime to produce real metrics; offline it degrades to a note. Single train/test evaluation, not nested CV.
